# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Daily Update (Apr 9, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 9, 2026, focused on refining the user interface experience within the Telegram plugin, specifically addressing how chat display names are presented.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **UI/UX Improvements:**

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None*
